title: Forging The Unthinkable
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/281ac9c3e210399cfddd021ac65304e1b561d59d.png)

**Forging the Unthinkable** is a mod that adds new tools, items, and blocks to Minecraft. Players can create a Nether Explorer by assigning a villager the new profession using the Nether Wracker block. This villager trades Primordial Powder, a unique item capable of cutting through Netherite, essential for transforming a Netherite Sword into the Broken Netherite Sword, which serves as the base for crafting powerful special weapons.

**Key Items:**
- **Frozen Heart**: Dropped by witches, used to craft weapons with ice effects.
- **Melted Heart**: Dropped by Master Piglin, who rarely spawns in the Nether, used to create weapons with fire powers.
- **Wither Heart**: Dropped by the Wither, essential for weapons that apply the wither effect.
- **Nether Wracker**: A new smithing table that allows you to craft the new swords and give the **Nehter explorer** profession to a villager. **The Recipe is in the Screenshots**

**Tools Effects**
Melted Sword: Fire Resistance and Speed if you are in lava
Melted Pickaxe: Fire Resistance and Haste if you are below Y:0

Frozen Sword: When underwater you have Conduit power and Strength
Frozen Pickaxe: Same as the sword and Haste if you are below Y:0

Wither Sword: Immune to wither effect, Strength if you are in the Nether
Wither Pickaxe: Immune to wither effect, Speed if you are in the Nether and Haste if you are below Y:0

Experience these new tools and weapons to enhance your Minecraft adventure!
